fields.name: credit_score_result
fields.description: Root container for the credit score assessment result transmitted from credit department to risk and compliance

children.name: result_id
children.description: Unique identifier for this credit score result record

children.name: timestamp
children.description: Date and time when the credit score result was generated

children.name: source_department
children.description: Originating department that produced this assessment

children.name: destination_department
children.description: Target department receiving this assessment for review and compliance evaluation

children.name: customer
children.description: Customer identity and account information subject to the credit assessment

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer

children.name: name
children.description: Full name of the customer

children.name: date_of_birth
children.description: Customer's date of birth

children.name: account_number
children.description: Customer's bank account number in IBAN format

children.name: credit_score
children.description: Numerical credit score and rating classification for the customer

children.name: score
children.description: Numerical credit score value

children.name: score_range_min
children.description: Minimum value in the credit score range

children.name: score_range_max
children.description: Maximum value in the credit score range

children.name: rating
children.description: Categorical rating classification derived from the numerical score

children.name: assessment_date
children.description: Date on which the credit score assessment was performed

children.name: credit_assessment
children.description: Detailed credit exposure and payment behaviour analysis

children.name: total_credit_limit
children.description: Total approved credit limit extended to the customer

children.name: outstanding_balance
children.description: Current amount owed by the customer against the credit limit

children.name: utilization_rate
children.description: Proportion of available credit currently in use, expressed as a decimal between 0 and 1

children.name: payment_history_score
children.description: Numerical score reflecting the customer's historical payment performance and timeliness

children.name: delinquencies
children.description: Count of delinquent payment events on record

children.name: default_risk_level
children.description: Categorical assessment of the customer's probability of default

children.name: recommended_action
children.description: Credit decision recommendation based on the assessment

children.name: risk_indicators
children.description: Compliance and risk screening results relevant to regulatory and fraud concerns

children.name: fraud_risk
children.description: Assessment of fraud risk associated with the customer or transaction

children.name: compliance_flags
children.description: Array of compliance-related flags or alerts; empty if none detected

children.name: flag
children.description: Individual compliance flag or alert code

children.name: regulatory_concerns
children.description: Summary of any regulatory or legal concerns identified during assessment

children.name: review_status
children.description: Current status of the credit assessment review workflow

children.name: reviewed_by
children.description: Identifier of the credit analyst or system that performed the assessment review

children.name: approval_signature
children.description: Cryptographic or audit signature confirming the authenticity and integrity of the assessment result
